Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We need to produce a detailed description of the loan approval process according to the DECLARE model constraints

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Use the model need to trace flow start with Receive Application init and responded existence

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then from response Receive Application to Preliminary Credit Check response edge

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: From existence Receive Application and Gather Additional Documents both required

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: So after receiving application need to gather additional docs Possibly concurrently

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then Preliminary Credit Check precedes Gather Additional Documents Actually chain Preliminary Credit Check to target Gather Additional Documents in succession so Preliminary Credit Check before Gather Additional Documents

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Also Response edge from Receive Application to Preliminary Credit Check So after receiving do Preliminary Credit Check then Gather Additional Documents

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: There is also existence for both Receive Application and Gather Additional Documents meaning they must occur not necessarily ordered The exactly one constraint on Preliminary Credit Check means it occurs exactly once

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: The coexistence edge Gather Additional Documents to target Authorize Contract Terms meaning Gather Additional Documents and Authorize Contract Terms can coexist

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Need to examine chainprecedence Authorize Contract Terms target Preliminary Credit Check so Authorize Contract Terms must happen after Preliminary Credit Check

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Also noncoexistence Transfer Funds to target Receive Application meaning Transfer Funds and Receive Application cannot coexist likely means Transfer Funds cannot happen before Receive Application completed

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Nonsuccession Notify Customer to target Preliminary Credit Check meaning Notify Customer cannot succeed Preliminary Credit Check Or Notify Customer cannot follow directly We will interpret as Notify occurs after Transfer Funds

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait where does Quality Assurance Review appear

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Precedence edge Quality Assurance Review to target Authorize Contract Terms meaning QA review before authorize

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Also chainresponse Assemble Loan Offer Package to target Transfer Funds meaning after assembling offer transfer funds

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: And chainsuccession Quality Assurance Review to target Assemble Loan Offer Package meaning QA review before assembling offer

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So order after gathering docs we assemble loan offer package then Quality Assurance Review then authorize contract terms then transfer funds then notify customer

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Altresponse Transfer Funds to target Notify Customer means after transfer funds notify customer

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: Altprecedence Notify Customer to target Transfer Funds meaning notify before transfer contradicts We will interpret as notify occurs after transfer maybe

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We need to rationalize constraints overall logical flow Receive Application then Preliminary Credit Check then Gather Additional Documents then Assemble Loan Offer Package then Quality Assurance Review then Authorize Contract Terms then Transfer Funds then Notify Customer

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Also some constraints ensure certain activities cannot happen out of order for example no Transfer Funds before Receive Application no Notify before Credit Check
